title: calymella vulcanica
intro: Calymella vulcanica, also known as Vulcan's calymma, is a plant species in the family Gentianaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Calymella vulcanica is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing pain and swelling, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to alleviate symptoms of fever and inflammation.
